allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "vercel CLI not found" }; if \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { "GITHUB_TOKEN set" } else { "no GITHUB_TOKEN" }; if \($env:GH_TOKEN\) { "GH_TOKEN set" } else { "no GH_TOKEN" }; if \($env:VERCEL_TOKEN\) { "VERCEL_TOKEN set" } else { "no VERCEL_TOKEN" })

PowerShell($c = Get-Content C:\\f1\\lib\\money.ts -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $c = $c -replace [char]0x00A0, ' '; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\f1\\lib\\money.ts', $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); npx vitest run 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
